retry_reason: pci_dev_put unconditionally decrements the reference count and never fails; retry is meaningless and would constitute a use-after-free.
contract_summary: Release wrapper: drops a reference on the pci_dev stored in hba->pcidev by calling pci_dev_put. After the call, hba->pcidev is set to NULL and the chip number is cleared. The caller must not use the pci_dev pointer after this function is called. This function is typically used during driver unbinding or cleanup, ensuring that the PCI device reference is properly released. The function is safe to call when hba->pcidev is NULL (no-op).
